name: Getting summary and Matched Transaction details from Stage Env

steps.name: The page is loading, please wait
The page is loading, please wait
Clicking on microsoft log in button
The page is loading, please wait
The page is loading, please wait
The page is loading, please wait
The page is loading, please wait
The page is loading, please wait
Clicking on dont show again button
Clicking on yes button for log in
Clicking on reconsilation button after file upload
Scroll into view locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]')
Query count locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(1).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(2).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(3).locator('td')
Scroll into view locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']')
Query count locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(1).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(2).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(3).locator('td')
Wait for selector locator('//h3[text()=\'Internal Bank Transfers\']')
Wait for selector locator('//h3[text()=\'Cash Reconciliation Report\']')

Query count locator('//h3[text()=\'Cash Reconciliation Report\']/following::span[count(.|//h3[text()=\'Bank Deposits by Account:\']/preceding::span)=count(//h3[text()=\'Bank Deposits by Account:\']/preceding::span)]')
Scroll into view locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]')
Query count locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(1).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(2).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[contains(text(),\'Cash Receipts in Billing System not Found in Bank\')]//following::table[1]//tr').nth(3).locator('td')
Scroll into view locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']')
Query count locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(1).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(2).locator('td')
Evaluate locator('//h3[text()=\'Deposits in Bank/RFMS Not Found in Billing System\']//following::table[1]//tr').nth(3).locator('td')
Wait for selector locator('//h3[text()=\'Internal Bank Transfers\']')
Wait for selector locator('//h3[text()=\'Cash Reconciliation Report\']')

Query count locator('//h3[text()=\'Cash Reconciliation Report\']/following::span[count(.|//h3[text()=\'Bank Deposits by Account:\']/preceding::span)=count(//h3[text()=\'Bank Deposits by Account:\']/preceding::span)]')
